instructions.name: accept_authority_invitation
docs: Completes the authority transfer by setting the vault authority to
the pending authority. Requires both the current and new authority
to sign.

instructions.name: approve_request
docs: Approve a pending request, allowing the User to execute the Claim instruction.
This sets the Request's claimable NAV to the Vault's current NAV.

instructions.name: cancel_queued_deposit_request
docs: Cancels a pending queued deposit request. Assets are refunded immediately. The request
account remains open as a tombstone so the subscription queue can advance past it via
`skip_canceled_queue_request`. Only valid for vaults with SubscriptionQueue active.

instructions.name: cancel_queued_redemption_request
docs: Cancels a pending queued redeem request. Shares are minted back to the user immediately.
The request account remains open as a tombstone so the redemption queue can advance past
it via `skip_canceled_queue_request`. Only valid for vaults with RedemptionQueue
active.

instructions.name: cancel_request
docs: Cancels a pending request. For deposits, refunds the full amount
back to the user. For redemptions, mints the shares back.

instructions.name: claim
docs: User claims their shares or assets from an approved Deposit or Redemption request.
Request must be Claimable.

accounts.name: owner
docs: Necessary to send Request owner rent if Operator is claiming.

accounts.name: pending_vault
docs: Pending deposit vault — source for Redeem claims

accounts.name: user_share_account
docs: User's share TokenAccount — receives minted shares on Deposit (must be owned by
request.owner)

accounts.name: user_asset_account
docs: User's asset TokenAccount — receives transferred assets on Redeem (must be owned by
request.owner)

accounts.name: share_token_program
docs: Token program for share mint operations — only required for Deposit

instructions.name: create_deposit_request
docs: Creates a deposit request with state pending (Pending vault authority acceptance)

instructions.name: create_redeem_request
docs: Creates a redeem request with state pending (Pending vault authority acceptance)

instructions.name: create_vault
docs: Creates a new async vault with reserve and pending token accounts,
transfers share mint authority to the vault PDA, and initializes
the vault config in a paused + uninitialized state.

instructions.name: initialize_deposit_fee
docs: Adds a deposit fee TLV extension to the vault. Must be called
before vault initialization. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: initialize_min_redemption
docs: Adds MinRedemption extension to the vault. Must be called before vault
initialization. When active, redemption requests below the threshold are rejected.
Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: initialize_min_subscription
docs: Adds MinSubscription extension to the vault. Must be called before vault
initialization. When active, deposit requests below the threshold are rejected.
Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: initialize_pausable_redemptions
docs: Adds a PausableRedemptions TLV extension to the vault. Must be called
before vault initialization. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: initialize_pausable_subscriptions
docs: Adds a PausableSubscriptions TLV extension to the vault. Must be called
before vault initialization. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: initialize_redemption_queue
docs: Adds a RedemptionQueue TLV extension to the vault, enabling FIFO ordering
for redeem requests. Must be called before vault initialization. Requires authority
signature.

instructions.name: initialize_subscription_queue
docs: Adds a SubscriptionQueue TLV extension to the vault, enabling FIFO ordering
for deposit requests. Must be called before vault initialization. Requires authority
signature.

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Finalizes vault setup by marking it as initialized. Once initialized,
no new extensions can be added. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: initialize_withdrawal_fee
docs: Adds a withdrawal fee TLV extension to the vault. Must be called
before vault initialization. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: invite_new_authority
docs: Stores a pending authority on the vault without transferring control.
The new authority must later call `accept_authority_invitation` to
complete the transfer. Requires current authority signature.

instructions.name: reject_request
docs: Reject a pending request. For deposit requests, the deposited assets are
refunded to the user. For redeem requests, the shares are minted back to the user.
The request account is closed and its rent is returned to the user.

instructions.name: set_operator
docs: Sets an operator for the Request.
Requires Request owner signature.

instructions.name: skip_canceled_queue_request
docs: Permissionless instruction that advances the queue past a canceled request, closes the
request account, and returns rent to the original owner. Works for both subscription and
redemption queues; queue type is inferred from the request's type. Must be called in
ascending request ID order for consecutive tombstones.

instructions.name: update_deposit_fee
docs: Updates an existing deposit fee extension. The fee must have been
previously initialized. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: update_min_redemption
docs: Updates the threshold of an existing MinRedemption extension.
Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: update_min_subscription
docs: Updates the threshold of an existing MinSubscription extension.
Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: update_pausable_redemptions
docs: Updates the paused state of an existing PausableRedemptions extension.
When paused is true, new redeem requests are rejected. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: update_pausable_subscriptions
docs: Updates the paused state of an existing PausableSubscriptions extension.
When paused is true, new deposit requests are rejected. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: update_vault
docs: Updates the async vault configuration. Can modify paused status
and the fee_recipient. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: update_vault_nav
docs: Updates the vault nav and increases nav version by 1
Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: update_withdrawal_fee
docs: Updates an existing withdrawal fee extension. The fee must have been
previously initialized. Requires authority signature.

instructions.name: withdraw_assets
docs: Withdraws assets from the vault reserve to a specified token account.
Used for async operations such as deploying assets offchain.
Requires authority signature.

errors.name: ShareMintSupplyShouldBeZero
errors.msg: Share mint supply should be zero.

errors.name: InvalidPendingSharesVault
errors.msg: Pending Shares Vault is not valid.

errors.name: MissingFeeRecipient
errors.msg: Fee recipient account must be provided as a remaining account when fee > 0.

errors.name: RequestInvalidState
errors.msg: Request current state is not valid.

errors.name: InvalidRequestType
errors.msg: Invalid request type for this instruction.

errors.name: MissingRequiredAccount
errors.msg: A required optional account was not provided.

errors.name: RequestNotPending
errors.msg: Request is not in a Pending state.

errors.name: RequestNotClaimable
errors.msg: Request is not in a Claimable state.

errors.name: SubscriptionQueueOutOfOrder
errors.msg: Deposit request is not next in the subscription queue

errors.name: RequestIsNotCanceled
errors.msg: Request is not in a Canceled state.

errors.name: MustUseCancelQueuedDepositRequest
errors.msg: Queued deposit requests must be canceled via cancel_queued_deposit_request.

errors.name: RedemptionQueueOutOfOrder
errors.msg: Redeem request is not next in the redemption queue

errors.name: MustUseCancelQueuedRedemptionRequest
errors.msg: Queued redeem requests must be canceled via cancel_queued_redemption_request.

errors.name: SubscriptionAmountBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Deposit amount is below the minimum subscription threshold

errors.name: RedemptionAmountBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Redemption amount is below the minimum redemption threshold

errors.name: ApprovalRequestMismatch
errors.msg: Approval does not match the live request instance.

types.name: FeeType
docs: The fee types:
FixedAmount: a fixed fee is applied (ex 0.1 asset)
Percentage: the fee is a % of the transfer amount

types.name: Request
docs: Request account state for tracking an async deposit/redemption.

fields.name: vault
docs: Vault address

fields.name: request_type
docs: request type

fields.name: request_state
docs: request state

fields.name: owner
docs: User that made the request

fields.name: amount
docs: RequestType::Deposit - amount of assets being deposited
RequestType::Redeem - amount of shares being redeemed

fields.name: price
docs: NAV at which the assets (deposit) or shares (redeem) are being converted

fields.name: asset_mint_address
docs: mint address for deposit request (7575)

fields.name: created_at
docs: timestamp, slot or epoch

fields.name: nav_update_version
docs: nav update version (for permissionless actions)

fields.name: operator
docs: Operator allowed to claim on behalf of user (delegated controller)

types.name: RequestState
docs: Pending: neither approved nor rejected by the vault authority
Claimable: approved by the vault authority
Canceled: deposit/redemption request was refunded; account is kept open as a tombstone until the
subscription/redemption queue advances past this request's ID via
`skip_canceled_{subscription|redemption}_request`

types.name: RequestType
docs: The request types:
Deposit: the user wants to add assets to the vault
Redeem: the user wants to withdraw assets from the vault

fields.name: share_mint
docs: share mint address

fields.name: vault_token_account
docs: token account holding confirmed vault assets

fields.name: authority
docs: authority that can sign permissioned instructions

fields.name: fee_recipient
docs: pubkey that is required to own the TokenAccount fees are sent to

fields.name: paused
docs: paused

fields.name: initialized
docs: once a vault is initialized, no extensions can be added

fields.name: pending_vault
docs: token account holding assets from deposits awaiting share issuance

fields.name: nav
docs: net asset value (assets per share), default 0 until first NAV update

fields.name: nav_version
docs: nav version, incremented on each NAV update

fields.name: pending_async_requests
docs: count of pending async deposit/withdrawal requests

fields.name: total_asset_balance
docs: virtual vault asset balance, accounts for tokens that may
have been withdrawn by the vault authority
